headline: PPL to Pay Quarterly Stock Dividend July 1, 2026
summary: PPL Corporation (NYSE: PPL) declared a quarterly common stock dividend on Wednesday, May 13, 2026 of $0.2850 per share, payable Jul. 1, 2026 to shareowners of record as of Jun. 10, 2026.
